after:bump: if ! command -v yq &>/dev/null; then wget -qO /tmp/yq https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/latest/download/yq_linux_amd64 && chmod +x /tmp/yq && YQ=/tmp/yq; else YQ=yq; fi && $YQ eval '.version = "${version}"' -i helm/Chart.yaml && $YQ eval '.appVersion = "${version}"' -i helm/Chart.yaml
